title: Food and feed law: legislation update December 2024
body: "The Government Chemist produces quarterly reports summarising updates to UK legislation in food in and feed law. The updates includes UK and EU legislation, and other technical publications, such as FAO, which might be of interest. This update covers the period from 1 October to 31 December 2024.  The aim is to provide regular updates, to ensure contextual awareness and assist in the interpretation of chemical measurement data.  For more information about this report, advice on the topics described or general enquiries about the Government Chemist role contact:   Government ChemistQueens RoadTeddingtonTW11 0LYEmail Government.Chemist@lgcgroup.com  "
